ques: Find the current top 3 super-earth planets and give a brief introduction to them.
answer: Top 3 super-Earths: (1) LHS 1140 b — a rocky ~5–6 Earth-mass super-Earth in the habitable zone of a red dwarf ~49 ly away, a leading habitability/ocean-world candidate; (2) 55 Cancri e — the famous ~8 Earth-mass ultra-hot "lava world" orbiting a Sun-like star ~41 ly away (first super-Earth with a detected atmosphere); (3) Kepler-442b — a ~2.3 Earth-mass super-Earth in the habitable zone of a K-type star ~1,200 ly away, among the most Earth-like known planets.
